title: Codex Design System from Wikimedia
content: Codex from Directories: Components: Codex Design System by Wikimedia is a comprehensive toolkit for building user interfaces, emphasizing consistency across Wikimedia Foundation projects. System includes design tokens, a wide library of components, and a focus on accessibility, internationalization, and extensive browser and device support. Codex is maintained by the Wikimedia Foundation's Design Systems Team, with contributions from the wider Wikimedia community. Accessibility Color System Component overview Figma Repository Icons Illustrations Motion Spacing Tokens Typography Voice and Tone Accordion Alert banner Autocomplete Avatar Button Button group Cards Checkbox Chip Combobox Dialog Icon Label Link Menus Progress bar Radio button Search Select Switch Tabs Text area Text field
